channel.title: Ellery on Jeremy Roschelle
channel.description: Recent content in Ellery on Jeremy Roschelle

item.title: Portugal with Jacob and Ellery
item.description:
For 5 days we basked in Portugal’s abundant sunshine, delicious food, and friendly people.

Saturday

  • Seafood at the train station’s Time Out Market
  • Ornate design in the Palácio da Bolsa and adjacent church
  • Sunset looking back at Porto after walking across a bridge

Sunday

  • Train ride to Braga for Palm Sunday processions
  • Meeting the locals with friend Grant
  • Beautiful gardens and blooming trees
  • Big meat and cheese board at Orpheu Tapas

Monday

item.title: Colorful Porto, Portugal
item.description:
In five short days, Jacob, Ellery and I saw a wonderful slice of Portugal from our base in the city of Porto. This photo of Mercado Ferreira Borges set the stage. This iron-and-glass building is painted a bright red. It houses craft shops, restaurants and a nightclub. This collection of photos features the colorful sights we saw.

The São Bento train station displays tile artwork that tells a history of Portugal between the two major rivers, the Douro and the Minho.

item.title: Palm Sunday in Braga, Portugal
item.description: Semana Santa (Easter Week) coincided with my visit to Portugal to see Jacob and Ellery. On Palm Sunday, we decided to visit the city of Braga. Braga is the religious center of Portugal and celebrates with elaborate processions through the cobblestone streets. We arrived in Braga at the end of a 1-hour train ride from Porto. After a strong coffee at Nórdica Café, we waited in the square for the first procession.
